<html><head>
<style type="text/css">h1 {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
color: #E60048;
font-size: 25px;
}

h2 {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
color: #E60048;
font-size: 20px;
}

font-style: italic;
color: #E60048;
font-size: 20px;
}

h4 {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-style: italic;
color: #0095B8;
font-size: 20px;
}

div {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
color: #000000;
font-size: 16px;
}

p {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
color: #000000;
font-size: 18px;
}

li {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
color: #000000;
font-size: 18px;
}

hr {
	border: 0;
	height: 1px;
	background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #22BBFF, #0095B8, #22BBFF);
}

table {
	border-collapse: collapse;
}

tr:first-child {
	background-color: #8EE1FF;
}

table, th, td {
   border: 1px solid #0095B8;
}

.stitletext {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 30px;
padding-top: 4px;
padding-bottom: 4px;
color: #E60048;
border-bottom: medium dotted #0095B8;
font-weight: bold;
}

.proptext {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 16px;
padding-top: 2px;
padding-bottom: 2px;
color: #E60048;
font-weight: bold;
}

.liketext {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 18px;
padding-top: 2px;
padding-bottom: 2px;
color: #e50047;
font-weight: bold;
}

.hashtag {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 12px;
font-style: italic;
color: #666666;
}

.personas {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 12px;
color: #666666;
font-weight: bold;
}

.topcorner {
font-family: Calibri, Verdana;
font-size: 16px;
float:right;
top:100px;
right: 100px;
width: 300px;
height: auto;
background-color: #EBEBEB;
border-width: 1px;
border-color: #666666;
border-style: dotted;
padding: 3px;
box-shadow: 3px 3px 7px #AAAAAA;
}

.amenub {
color: #0095B8;
text-decoration: underline;}

.processDesc {
float:left;
}

.mainDiv {
	width:100%;
	height:100%;
}

.businessProcess {
	margin-top:30px;
	width:100%;
	height:100%;
}</style>
</head>
<body>

    <div id="wrapper" style="padding:40 50 40 50;background-color:#eef5f7;width:1000px;height:auto;">
      <div id="header" style="height:80px;">
        <p style="font-family:Zilla Slab, Calibri, sans-serif;color:#009ab9;font-size:42px;font-weight:600;margin:0;float:left;text-align:center;">
5 Fragen an Peter Pfiffig

        </p>

        
<img src="data:image/png;base64," style="float:right;">
      </div>
      <div id="content" style="height:520px;">
        <div id="picture" style="width:350px;float:left;height:520px;font-family:calibri;color:#0b2d3a;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;">
          
<img alt="" height="400px" src="data:image/png;base64,
" width="350px">
          <p style="margin:0px;margin-top:10px;text-align:center;">
Marketingmitarbeiter<br/>
Marketing<br/>
Buddy: Heiko 
Storbeck
          </p>

          <p style="margin:0px;text-align:center;">
&nbsp;

          </p>

          <p style="margin:0px;text-align:center;">
&nbsp;

          </p>

        </div>
        <div id="questions" style="width:600px;float:left;font-family:calibri;color:#0b2d3a;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;margin-left:30px;">
          <p style="margin-top:0px;">
1) Woran erkennen wir dich?<span style="font-family:Default; color:#000000;">             
</span><br><span style="font-family:calibri; font-size:20px; font-weight:400;">An meinem guten Geschmack und immer einen lockeren Spruch auf den Lippen</span>

          </p>

          <p>
2) Wie kommst du ab jetzt jeden Morgen zu ADITO?            
<br><span style="font-family:calibri; font-size:20px; font-weight:400;">Mit Bus und Bahn oder (bei gutem Wetter) mit dem Drahtesel.</span>

          </p>

          <p>
3) Dönerbude, bayerisches Wirtshaus oder Tupper-Dose: Welcher Mittagessen-Typ bist du?            
<br><span style="font-family:calibri; font-size:20px; font-weight:400;">Ich bin ein Fast-Food-Junkie! :-D </span>

          </p>

          <p>
4) Auf welche drei Gegenstände kannst du im Büro nicht verzichten?            
<br><span style="font-family:calibri; font-size:20px; font-weight:400;">Digitaler Notizblock, Süßigkeitenbox, Mittagslektüre</span>

          </p>

          <p>
5) Wie sieht dein perfekter Feierabend aus?            
<br><span style="font-family:calibri; font-size:20px; font-weight:400;">Entweder mit meinen Freunden unterwegs oder eine gute Serie.</span>

          </p>

        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="footer" style="height:70px;width:800px;background-color:#ed1652;clear:both;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;">
        <p style="font-family:Zilla Slab, Calibri, sans-serif;color:#FFF;font-size:32px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;padding-top:20px;">

        </p>

      </div>
